events.name: Sunset Coastal Cruise
events.description: An evening coastal cruise featuring classic cars driving the scenic shoreline with photo stops and a beachfront meetup.

events.name: Main Show & Shine
events.description: Our 2-day flagship Show & Shine with judged classes, vendor row, and special displays for classics, muscles, and customs.

events.name: Annual Show & Shine 2023
events.description: The 2023 edition of our Annual Show & Shine featuring record attendance and stunning award-winning classics.

events.name: Friday Welcome Cruise
events.description: Kick off the main event weekend with a relaxed Friday evening cruise through downtown Springfield.

events.name: Parts Swap Meet & Marketplace
events.description: Find rare parts, memorabilia, and project cars at our massive classic car swap meet.

events.name: Restoration Workshop Day 1
events.description: Hands-on sessions covering rust repair, metalwork basics, and paint prep for classic restorations.

events.name: Restoration Workshop Day 2
events.description: Advanced topics including interior restoration, wiring, and engine detailing.

events.name: Downtown Showcase Parade
events.description: Day 1 showcase parade rolling through downtown with announcer commentary at the main grandstand.

events.name: Convertible Spotlight Parade
events.description: A special parade block exclusively for classic convertibles and open-top tourers.

events.name: Evening Cruise-In & Concert
events.description: Park your classic under the lights while enjoying live rockabilly and food trucks.

events.name: Tech Seminar: Safety Upgrades for Classic Cars
events.description: A technical session on adding modern safety features to classic cars while preserving originality.

events.name: Charity Cruise for a Cause
events.description: A relaxed Sunday afternoon charity cruise benefiting local youth automotive programs.

gallery_photos.title: Best in Show Convertible - 1967 Camaro RS
gallery_photos.description: The overall Best in Show convertible winner lining up at the main judging lane.

gallery_photos.title: People's Choice Convertible - 1959 Impala
gallery_photos.description: Crowd favorite 1959 Impala with the top down and period-correct accessories.

gallery_photos.title: Best Restored Convertible - 1965 Mustang
gallery_photos.description: Immaculate Wimbledon White Mustang receiving its restoration trophy.

gallery_photos.title: Judge's Choice Convertible - 1970 Chevelle SS
gallery_photos.description: A rare color combo Chevelle SS convertible on the awards ramp.

gallery_photos.title: Top 5 Convertible - 1963 Corvette Sting Ray
gallery_photos.description: Split-window styling with the top folded neatly behind the seats.

gallery_photos.title: Top 5 Convertible - 1968 Firebird 400
gallery_photos.description: Bright red Firebird with period-correct wheels in the winners' circle.

gallery_photos.title: Top 5 Convertible - 1964 GTO Tribute
gallery_photos.description: A carefully built tribute car that impressed the judges.

gallery_photos.title: Best Paint Convertible - 1969 Charger R/T Custom
gallery_photos.description: Deep metallic paint reflecting the grandstand lights at dusk.

gallery_photos.title: Best in Show Coupe - 1957 Bel Air
gallery_photos.description: Tri-five Chevy coupe gleaming under the main pavilion lights.

gallery_photos.title: Best Classic Truck - 1972 C10
gallery_photos.description: Lowered C10 with beautifully restored wood bed.

gallery_photos.title: Morning Roll-In
gallery_photos.description: Rows of classics lining up for Saturday morning check-in on the showfield.

gallery_photos.title: Cruise Night Downtown
gallery_photos.description: Saturday night cruise with neon lights reflecting off polished chrome.

gallery_photos.title: Early Morning Setup
gallery_photos.description: Volunteers setting up cones and signage before gates open.

gallery_photos.title: Sunset Coastal Cruise Lineup
gallery_photos.description: Classics staged along the pier ready for the 2024 Sunset Coastal Cruise.

hotels.name: Springfield Garage Suites
hotels.description: Classic-car-friendly suites with attached covered garage bays and trailer-friendly back lot.

hotels.name: Downtown Classic Inn
hotels.description: Boutique inn in a restored historic building, a short drive from the fairgrounds.

hotels.name: Fairgrounds Lodge
hotels.description: Budget-friendly lodge directly across from the main entrance with easy walk-in access.

hotels.name: Route 66 Motor Court
hotels.description: Retro motor court with individually themed rooms celebrating Route 66 history.

hotels.name: Capital City Hotel & Conference Center
hotels.description: Full-service hotel with conference facilities, restaurant, and shuttle service to the fairgrounds.

hotels.name: Suburban Suites East
hotels.description: Extended-stay suites with kitchenettes and ample surface parking.

hotels.name: Airport Express Inn
hotels.description: Convenient option near the regional airport with park-and-fly packages.

hotels.name: Lakeside Resort West
hotels.description: Scenic lakeside resort with boat rentals and upscale dining, a short drive from the show.

membership_plans.name: Classic Monthly
membership_plans.description: Entry-level monthly membership with digital newsletter and member pricing on merchandise.

membership_plans.name: Cruiser Annual
membership_plans.description: Best-value annual plan with priority event parking, print newsletter, and member discounts.

membership_plans.name: Family Annual Plus
membership_plans.description: Family plan with priority event parking, family access, and upgraded hospitality at select events.

membership_plans.name: Digital Supporter
membership_plans.description: Online-only membership for distant fans with access to digital content and livestreams.

membership_plans.name: Legacy Lifetime (Closed)
membership_plans.description: Grandfathered lifetime membership tier no longer offered to new members.

product_categories.name: Posters & Prints
product_categories.description: Event posters, vintage-style art prints, and garage decor.

product_categories.name: Apparel
product_categories.description: Event t-shirts, jackets, hats, and other wearable gear.

product_categories.name: Accessories
product_categories.description: Keychains, patches, mugs, lanyards, and other small items.

product_categories.name: Models & Diecast
product_categories.description: Scale models and diecast versions of classic favorites.

shipping_options.name: Standard (5–7 days)
shipping_options.description: Economy ground shipping within 5–7 business days.

shipping_options.name: Expedited (2–3 days)
shipping_options.description: Faster shipping for when you need your items sooner.

shipping_options.name: Overnight (1 day)
shipping_options.description: Next-business-day delivery for most U.S. addresses.

shipping_options.name: Event Will-Call Pickup
shipping_options.description: Pick up your order at the merchandise tent during the main event weekend.

volunteer_signups.name: Morgan Lee
volunteer_signups.comments: Available both mornings; prefer parking or gate greeting.

volunteer_signups.name: Sam Patel
volunteer_signups.comments: Good with radios and logistics; can help with load-in on Friday.

volunteer_signups.name: Jamie Chen
volunteer_signups.comments: Would like an information booth shift; comfortable answering questions.

volunteer_signups.name: Chris Johnson
volunteer_signups.comments: Can tow disabled vehicles if needed; bringing own safety vest.

volunteer_signups.name: Riley Adams
volunteer_signups.comments: Happy to help wherever needed; this is my first year volunteering.

products.name: Sunset Coastal Cruise 1965 Poster
products.description: Vintage-style 18"x24" poster celebrating a 1965 sunset coastal cruise, printed on heavyweight matte stock.

products.name: Muscle Mayhem 1969 Night Meet Poster
products.description: Bold 24"x36" poster featuring a lineup of late-60s muscle cars under neon lights.

products.name: Convertible Dreams 1965 Show Poster
products.description: Soft-tone illustration of 1960s convertibles at a seaside show, perfect for garage decor.

products.name: Show & Shine 1972 Retro Poster
products.description: Reproduction event poster inspired by early 1970s Show & Shine meets.

products.name: Route 66 Classic Map Print
products.description: Artwork featuring a stylized map of historic Route 66 with classic car silhouettes.

products.name: Garage Blueprint Collage
products.description: Collage of blueprint-style line drawings of classic coupes and convertibles.

products.name: Main Show & Shine 2025 Event T-Shirt
products.description: Official 2025 event tee with front logo and back print of the showfield layout.

products.name: Garage Logo Pullover Hoodie
products.description: Mid-weight hoodie featuring the club's classic shield logo.

products.name: Route 66 Trucker Cap
products.description: Two-tone trucker cap with embroidered Route 66 shield and club script.

products.name: Pit Crew Windbreaker Jacket
products.description: Lightweight pit-crew style jacket with embroidered chest patch and back print.

products.name: Acrylic Club Logo Keychain
products.description: Clear acrylic keychain with full-color club emblem, ready for your classic's keys.

products.name: Garage Enamel Mug
products.description: White enamel mug with navy rim and vintage script logo, ideal for shop coffee.

products.name: 1:24 1968 Chevy Camaro Diecast
products.description: Detailed diecast model of a 1968 Camaro with opening doors and hood.

products.name: 1:18 1957 Chevy Bel Air Diecast
products.description: Premium 1:18 scale '57 Bel Air in turquoise and white two-tone.

schedule_sessions.title: Opening Ceremony & Driver Meeting
schedule_sessions.description: Welcome remarks, safety briefing, and overview of the weekend schedule for participants.

schedule_sessions.title: Workshop: Intro to Bodywork & Metal Shaping
schedule_sessions.description: Hands-on demonstration of basic dent repair, hammer and dolly techniques, and patch panel installation.

schedule_sessions.title: Workshop: Paint Prep Secrets for Show-Quality Finish
schedule_sessions.description: Surface prep, block sanding, and masking tips to achieve flat, mirror-like paint.

schedule_sessions.title: Downtown Showcase Parade
schedule_sessions.description: Guided parade route through historic downtown with announcer commentary at the grandstand.

schedule_sessions.title: Evening Cruise-In Lineup
schedule_sessions.description: Staged parking and rolling entrance for the evening cruise-in and concert.

schedule_sessions.title: Talk: Inside the Judge's Notebook
schedule_sessions.description: Panel discussion on how Show & Shine judges score cars in different categories.

schedule_sessions.title: Workshop: DIY Interior Restoration
schedule_sessions.description: Seat frame repair, foam replacement, and carpet installation on a typical 60s coupe interior.

schedule_sessions.title: Talk: Preserve or Modify? Finding Your Build Style
schedule_sessions.description: A balanced discussion on originality, tasteful upgrades, and restomod approaches.

schedule_sessions.title: Tech Seminar: Safety Upgrades for Classic Cars
schedule_sessions.description: Disc brake swaps, seat belt upgrades, and lighting improvements that keep classics safer on modern roads.

schedule_sessions.title: Convertible Spotlight Parade
schedule_sessions.description: All-convertible parade loop featuring award-winning and participant cars with tops down.

schedule_sessions.title: Main Awards Presentation
schedule_sessions.description: Trophies for class winners, specialty awards, and Best in Show announcements.

schedule_sessions.title: Charity Cruise for a Cause
schedule_sessions.description: Scenic afternoon cruise; all proceeds benefit local youth automotive training programs.

show_categories.name: Pre-1945 Originals & Restorations
show_categories.description: Stock and period-correct restorations of vehicles built up to model year 1945.

show_categories.name: 1946–1959 Classic Cruisers
show_categories.description: Post-war coupes, sedans, wagons, and convertibles focused on style and cruising comfort.

show_categories.name: 1960–1963 Early Sixties Specials
show_categories.description: Early 60s finned and compact classics prior to the peak muscle era.

show_categories.name: 1964–1973 Muscle Cars
show_categories.description: Factory and period-correct muscle cars including GTO, Chevelle SS, Camaro, Mustang, Charger, and similar performance models.

show_categories.name: 1974–1989 Emerging Modern Classics
show_categories.description: Later-generation classics, including early hot hatches, Radwood-era coupes, and sports cars.

show_categories.name: Classic Trucks & Customs (All Years)
show_categories.description: Classic pickups, panels, and heavily modified customs from any model year.

volunteer_shifts.title: Parking Team - Early Arrival
volunteer_shifts.notes: Direct early haulers and trailer rigs into assigned rows.

volunteer_shifts.title: Parking Team - Morning Rush
volunteer_shifts.notes: Help manage peak arrival traffic and guide cars to class rows.

volunteer_shifts.title: Parking Team - Late Arrivals & Overflow
volunteer_shifts.notes: Assist late-arriving participants and spectators, monitor overflow lots.

volunteer_shifts.title: Information Booth - Morning
volunteer_shifts.location: Info Booth A - Main Gate Plaza
volunteer_shifts.notes: Answer questions about schedule, restrooms, and food vendors; hand out maps.

volunteer_shifts.title: Information Booth - Midday
volunteer_shifts.location: Info Booth A - Main Gate Plaza
volunteer_shifts.notes: Assist guests arriving for awards and parades; restock printed schedules.

volunteer_shifts.title: Information Booth - Awards & Close
volunteer_shifts.location: Info Booth A - Main Gate Plaza
volunteer_shifts.notes: Direct visitors to awards stage and assist with end-of-day questions.

volunteer_shifts.title: Gate Greeter & Wristbands
volunteer_shifts.notes: Welcome guests, check pre-purchased tickets, and apply wristbands.

volunteer_shifts.title: Parking Team - Saturday Roll-In
volunteer_shifts.notes: Help position vehicles for Day 1 judging and confirm class placards are visible.

volunteer_shifts.title: Parking Team - Late Morning
volunteer_shifts.notes: Support continued roll-in and re-parking for swap meet visitors.

volunteer_shifts.title: Information Booth - Saturday Morning
volunteer_shifts.location: Info Booth A - Main Gate Plaza
volunteer_shifts.notes: Help guests find specific show classes, restrooms, and workshop locations.

volunteer_shifts.title: Information Booth - Saturday Afternoon
volunteer_shifts.location: Info Booth A - Main Gate Plaza
volunteer_shifts.notes: Answer schedule questions and give directions to downtown parade viewing areas.

volunteer_shifts.title: Vehicle Registration - Check-In Desk
volunteer_shifts.notes: Look up pre-registered vehicles, distribute windshield cards, and process day-of entries.

volunteer_shifts.title: Merchandise Tent - Midday Shift
volunteer_shifts.notes: Assist with event t-shirt and poster sales; help keep display area organized.

volunteer_shifts.title: Swap Meet Support - Vendor Check-In
volunteer_shifts.notes: Direct vendors to assigned spaces and answer basic swap meet layout questions.

event_ticket_options.name: Standard Cruise Entry (1 vehicle, no banquet)
event_ticket_options.description: Includes staging access for one classic vehicle and driver for the June 15 Sunset Coastal Cruise. No banquet access included.

event_ticket_options.name: Premium Cruise Entry + Beach Banquet
event_ticket_options.description: One vehicle entry plus post-cruise beachside banquet access for driver and one guest.

event_ticket_options.name: Passenger Only (no vehicle)
event_ticket_options.description: Ride along as a passenger in a registered vehicle; no vehicle staging included.

event_ticket_options.name: Day-Of Cruise Registration (1 vehicle)
event_ticket_options.description: Limited availability day-of registration for one vehicle, subject to space in staging areas.

event_ticket_options.name: Show Vehicle Registration - Saturday Only
event_ticket_options.description: Includes showfield space for one vehicle on Saturday, eligibility for daily awards, and driver admission.

event_ticket_options.name: Show Vehicle Registration - Weekend Pass
event_ticket_options.description: Showfield parking for one vehicle on both days, eligibility for class and specialty awards, and driver admission all weekend.

event_ticket_options.name: Show Vehicle + Awards Banquet Package
event_ticket_options.description: Weekend show registration for one vehicle plus Sunday evening awards banquet access for driver and one guest.

event_ticket_options.name: Spectator Weekend Pass
event_ticket_options.description: General admission for one spectator on both days of the Main Show & Shine. No vehicle entry.

event_ticket_options.name: Restoration Workshop Day 1 Pass
event_ticket_options.description: Access to all Day 1 restoration workshop sessions, including bodywork and paint prep demonstrations.

event_ticket_options.name: Workshop Day 1 + Materials Kit
event_ticket_options.description: Day 1 workshop access plus a take-home starter kit with abrasives, filler, and masking supplies.

event_ticket_options.name: Restoration Workshop Day 2 Pass
event_ticket_options.description: Access to all Day 2 restoration workshop sessions covering interiors, wiring, and detailing.

event_ticket_options.name: Workshop Weekend Bundle (Day 1 + Day 2)
event_ticket_options.description: Discounted bundle for both restoration workshop days. Includes priority seating and Q&A access.

event_ticket_options.name: Charity Cruise Entry (1 vehicle)
event_ticket_options.description: Includes staging for one classic vehicle and driver. A portion of proceeds supports youth automotive programs.

event_ticket_options.name: Charity Cruise Entry (2 vehicles same owner)
event_ticket_options.description: Discounted bundle for owners bringing two vehicles to the charity cruise.
